title: narcissus poeticus subsp. recurvus
intro: Narcissus poeticus subsp. recurvus, also known as the recurved poetic daffodil, is a subspecies of the Narcissus poeticus plant, a type of flowering bulbous perennial native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus subsp. recurvus include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, relieve respiratory problems, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
